# The Fixation of Belief

*[Charles Sanders Peirce](../philosophers/peirce.md) · 1877 · *The Fixation of Belief**

The first of the Illustrations of the Logic of Science, this essay reviews four ways of fixing belief, tenacity, authority, the a priori taste and the method of science, keeping only the last: only a method answerable to something independent of us can correct us.
